images.prompt: Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: Let's invent a new silly song to sing together!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.
Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: My friend wants to invent a machine that makes endless cookies!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.
Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: Maybe one day you will invent a super-fast way to travel to the moon!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.

G1.definition: To make something new that no one has ever made before.
G1.example: Maybe one day you will invent a super-fast way to travel to the moon!
G1.tryIt: What is one new thing you would like to invent to make playtime even more fun?

K.definition: To make something brand new that no one has ever thought of before!
K.example: My friend wants to invent a machine that makes endless cookies!
K.tryIt: If you could invent anything in the whole wide world, what would it be?

preK.definition: To invent means to make something brand new that no one else has ever thought of before!
preK.example: Let's invent a new silly song to sing together!
preK.tryIt: What new game could you invent if you had all your toys?
